item.title: 'This is our culture': Japan fans clean up World Cup stadium
item.description:
Japan fans left the stands spotless after their World Cup opener against the Netherlands in Texas on Sunday, saying it was ‘Japanese culture’ to tidy up after themselves.

item.description: Textiles and jute minister Khandakar Abdul Muktadir on Monday told Jatiya Sangsad that Bangladesh’s jute products were facing increasing pressure in the global market due to the growing use of low-cost synthetic fibres....
